title: The Melodious Meritorious Mouse
content:
The Melodious Meritorious Mouse,
    who played a merry minuet on the
    Piano-forte.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "The Melodious Meritorious Mouse", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
